action.reasoning: Observation: ResNet-50 baseline (30 epochs, domain-weighted, grayscale) reached 12.27% Quickdraw accuracy. Switched to ViT-B/16 AugReg (86M) but training failed (likely OOM or config). Command stderr shows torchrun DDP exit code 1/15 – indicative of OOM with ViT+larger batch. Analysis: ViT requires more memory. I must reduce batch size, use mixed precision, and verify code. Decision: Rewrite train.py with AMP, batch_size 64/GPU, AdamW, lr=3e-5, 5 epochs for quick ViT baseline. Submit eval immediately to measure speed and accuracy.
